sections.content: Health insurance Rs 5 lakh/family/year for hospitalization. 55 crore beneficiaries (12 crore families). Cashless at 30,000+ empanelled hospitals. No cap on family size/age/gender. Pre-existing conditions covered from day one.

Based on SECC 2011. Rural: kucha house, no adult 16-59, female-headed, disabled, SC/ST, landless, manual labour. Urban: rag picker, beggar, domestic worker, street vendor, construction worker, plumber, sweeper, security guard, rickshaw puller.

sections.section_path: PM-JAY > How to Check & Get Card
sections.content: Check: (1) pmjay.gov.in > Am I Eligible. (2) Call 14555. (3) Visit Ayushman Mitra at hospital. (4) CSC centre. If eligible, get free Ayushman card with photo and QR.

Steps: (1) Visit empanelled hospital. (2) Show card or Aadhaar biometric verification. (3) Hospital generates pre-auth. (4) Cashless treatment. (5) Hospital claims from insurer. 1,949 packages: cardiology, oncology, orthopedics, neurosurgery, burns, dialysis, cataract, mental health. 3-day pre and 15-day post hospitalization covered.
